peculiarities:
ஐ is a gliding sound: 'ai' as in 'aisle', or the 'i' in 'kite'. It starts open and slides upward, two sounds moving as one.

It is also one of the most beautiful shapes in the alphabet, with three curls stacked together. Take it slowly; our snake needs a long, winding path for this one, and that is why you get extra time to trace it.
